sic_description: Plastic Material, Synth Resin/Rubber, Cellulos (No Glass)
summary: PARTI The Company: Sealed Air Overview Sealed Air Corporation (Sealed Air, or the Company, also referred to as we, us, or our) is a leading global provider of packaging solutions that integrate sustainable, high-performance materials, automation, equipment and services. Sealed Air designs, manufactures and delivers packaging solutions that preserve food, protect goods and automate packaging processes. We deliver our packaging solutions to an array of end markets including fresh proteins, foods, ...
